description: Stitching instructions for front and back panels

seams.label: Front Center Fold / Side Left Edge
seams.description: Stitch the left edge of front panel to left edge of front mirror panel (center front seam)

seams.label: Back Center Fold / Side Left Edge
seams.description: Stitch the left edge of back panel to left edge of back mirror panel (center back seam)

seams.label: Right Shoulder Seam
seams.description: Stitch the right shoulder of front panel to the right shoulder of back panel

seams.label: Right Side Seam
seams.description: Stitch the right side seam of front panel to the right side seam of back panel

seams.label: Left Shoulder Seam (Mirror)
seams.description: Stitch the left shoulder of front mirror panel to the left shoulder of back mirror panel

seams.label: Left Side Seam (Mirror)
seams.description: Stitch the left side seam of front panel to the left side seam of back panel
